visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A boy wearing a red and blue striped shirt sits on a tiled floor, using a white electric hand mixer to stir a bowl of pale yellow batter. To his left, a small child in a white shirt sits watching. To his right, another boy in a green and blue striped shirt assists. An adult woman in a white tank top sits behind them, holding a small blue and yellow bowl. The setting is a brightly lit modern kitchen with light wood cabinetry. Red Chinese text appears at the bottom. (2) The boy mixing the batter looks down and begins to laugh, squinting his eyes and opening his mouth wide. The camera zooms in slightly as the text '竟然!!' appears in bold red characters. The woman leans in closer to see what happened. (3) A digital rewind effect is applied to the footage, with the text '倒帶' and rewind icons appearing in the center. (4) The camera provides a close-up insert shot of the yellow batter. A single small, black, round object is visible stuck to one of the mixer's beaters. A white comic-style speech bubble appears with the text '這是什麼?'. (5) From a higher side angle, the boy continues mixing. A red arrow appears, first pointing to his mouth and then to the black pearl in the batter. Yellow and red captions explain the situation. A laughing emoji and '好噁心' text appear in the corner. (6) The boy tilts his head back in hysterical laughter, his hands still holding the mixer as the woman continues to assist.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 餅乾做到一半... (2) [Subtitle]: 竟然!! (3) [Subtitle]: 倒帶. (4) [Variety]: 這是什麼? (5) [Subtitle]: 換個角度再看一次. [Subtitle]: 還沒咀嚼完的珍珠. [Variety]: *好噁心😂.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female assisting, 2 boys actively involved, and 1 young girl watching in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The primary boy is wearing a red/blue striped shirt; the woman is in a white sleeveless top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern domestic kitchen featuring light-colored wooden cabinets, a tiled floor, and various packaged snacks visible on the countertops in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The mechanical whirring of a hand mixer provides a constant high-frequency background layer. An adult female voice is heard speaking in a soft, encouraging tone. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks a moment of discovery, followed immediately by high-arousal child laughter. The mixer sound continues. (3) A distinct 'rewind' sound effect, mimicking the scratching of magnetic tape, indicates a replay of the audio. (4) An orchestral hit 'shock' sound effect plays as the visual focus shifts to the object in the bowl. (5) Comedic, lighthearted synthesizer music begins to loop in the background. The child's laughter becomes louder and more rhythmic, coinciding with exclamations of surprise from the adult female.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Setup -> Discovery -> Replay -> Explanation -> Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share a humorous, unexpected family moment where a child accidentally spat a boba pearl into a bowl of cookie batter while mixing it, using comedic editing to enhance the storytelling.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes popular short-form editing tropes such as the 'rewind' replay and humorous sound effects to turn a minor cooking mishap into an engaging comedic narrative.
